title: triticum aestivum var. muticum
intro: Triticum aestivum var. muticum, commonly known as mutant wheat or dwarf wheat, is a variety of wheat that is characterized by its compact growth habit and smaller grain size compared to other types of wheat. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of mutant wheat include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In traditional herbal preparations, mutant wheat is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be cautioned due to potential allergenic effects and interactions with medications.
